text: 29-31 JULY 2025 HALL NO. 1 C | YASHOBHOOMI (IICC), DWARKA, NEW DELHI | POST SHOW REPORT | ORGANISED BY:

BIO ENERGY GLOBAL 2025 – POWERED BY MNRE | Bio Energy Global 2025 |  had the honor to have the  | Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE), Government of India |  extend their valuable support towards the event. | The three-day expo was  | powered by  | Ministry of New and Renewable Energy | , reinforcing the Government’s commitment to advancing renewable and sustainable energy solutions. | Ministry of New and Renewable Energy |  participated with its dedicated pavilion | , where participants and beneficiaries showcased innovations and initiatives in the fields of  | Bio Gas, Bio Energy, and Renewable Technologies | . | The pavilion became a hub for  | knowledge sharing, awareness, and demonstration |  of India’s progress in clean energy transition, attracting significant attention from industry leaders, policymakers, and international visitors.

BIO ENERGY GLOBAL 2025 – IN ASSOCIATION WITH  | MISSION SAMARTH, MINISTRY OF POWER | Bio Energy Global 2025 was proudly supported in association with Mission Samarth – Ministry of Power, Government of India. | The collaboration highlighted the Ministry’s commitment to driving energy efficiency, renewable adoption, and sustainable development. | The expo was inaugurated by the Director of Mission Samarth, Ministry of Power, marking a prestigious beginning to the three-day event. | Through this association, the platform emphasized India’s roadmap towards clean energy transition, aligning with the nation’s mission to achieve a net-zero future.

HIGH-LEVEL OPENING CEREMONY | The inauguration of  | Bio Energy Global 2025 |  marked a prestigious beginning to the three-day expo. The ceremony was led by Notably  | Hon’ble Shri Anil Baweja, Director of Mission Samarth – Ministry of Power | , who performed the traditional lamp lighting and officially declared the event open. His presence highlighted the Government’s commitment to advancing India’s renewable and sustainable energy transition. | The lamp lighting was joined by eminent dignitaries including  | Dr. Rasmus Wendt, Energy Counsellor – The Royal Danish Embassy, New Delhi | , who leads Denmark–India cooperation on sustainable energy through diplomacy and global economic expertise. Other distinguished leaders present were  | Shri. R. C. Agarwal, Executive Director, Centre for High Technology (CHT), MoPNG | ,  | Shri. Sambhaji Kadupatil (IAS Retd.), Director General, Vasantdada Sugar Institute (VSI), Pune | ,  | Lt. Col. Monish Ahuja (Retd.), Chairman & Managing Director – PRESPL and Chairman, CBEII | , along with  | Mr. Balram Gupta, CEO, Meera Trade Fair Media Pvt. Ltd. | Their collective presence underscored the  | strategic importance of bioenergy and clean technologies | , while reinforcing India’s leadership role in shaping a sustainable global energy future. | The inauguration set the tone of  | collaboration, innovation, and shared responsibility | , bringing together policymakers, industry leaders, and global stakeholders with a unified vision to accelerate the journey toward a greener tomorrow.
Photos of Expo and Stalls to be Inserted

BIO ENERGY AWARDS 2025 | The  | Bio Energy Awards 2025 |  celebrated the brightest minds, innovative solutions, and impactful projects in the bioenergy and renewable energy sectors. With  | 20 prestigious awards |  across  | Individual, Organizational, and Special Recognition |  categories, the platform honored those driving progress toward a cleaner, greener future. | The awards recognized outstanding achievements in areas such as  | bioenergy, biogas production, biofuels, biomass energy, circular economy practices, green technology, and sustainable leadership | . Winners were chosen from a strong pool of nominees representing India’s most promising innovators, researchers, and organizations, showcasing the sector’s depth of talent and innovation. | These accolades not only highlighted  | industry excellence and pioneering contributions |  but also reinforced Bio Energy Global 2025 as a platform that inspires collaboration, innovation, and leadership in renewable energy.
WINNERS OF  | BIO ENERGY AWARDS 2025

Conferences & Knowledge Sessions | Bio Energy Global Summit 2025 |  and the  | 3rd National Conference on Bioenergy India (NCBI) |  formed the intellectual core of the expo, creating a vibrant space for dialogue and collaboration. | Global Thought Leadership: |  Brought together international experts, policymakers, and innovators to share insights on the future of bioenergy. | Policy & Regulation Dialogues: |  Addressed government frameworks, incentives, and strategies for accelerating renewable adoption. | Innovation & Technology Exchange: |  Showcased advancements in bioenergy, biofuels, biomass, biogas, green hydrogen, and sustainable energy solutions. | Sustainability & Net-Zero Goals: |  Explored pathways to achieve decarbonization, circular economy practices, and climate commitments. | Inclusive Growth: |  Highlighted entrepreneurship, industry collaboration, and opportunities for rural and women-led participation in the bioenergy sector.

BIO ENERGY GLOBAL 2025: Connecting Global Leaders, Driving A Green Tomorrow | We are delighted to share the remarkable success of  | Bio Energy Global 2025 | , held from  | 29th to 31st July 2025 |  at  | Hall – 1C, Yashobhoomi, IICC, Dwarka, New Delhi | . Organized in collaboration with leading industry bodies and supported by key government agencies, the event established itself as a definitive platform for advancing innovation, investment, and global dialogue in renewable and sustainable energy. With participation from international delegations, policymakers, and industry leaders, it showcased cutting-edge solutions across  | bioenergy | ,  | biofuels, biomass, biogas, green hydrogen, and circular economy innovations | , fostering opportunities for collaboration, knowledge sharing, and technological exchange. | Going beyond exhibitions,  | Bio Energy Global 2025 |  explored critical narratives shaping the global energy transition—from scaling renewable technologies to ensuring energy security and environmental responsibility. The event emphasized the importance of  | achieving net-zero goals, decarbonizing industries, and building a sustainable future |  that balances growth with ecological well-being. By uniting  | governments, corporates, researchers, and entrepreneurs | , it demonstrated the power of innovation and collaboration, positioning India as a key contributor to the global renewable energy landscape and accelerating cross-border partnerships that will shape a greener tomorrow. | In Association With : | Powered By : | Global Event Partner |  : | I | nternational |  Partner : | Knowledge  | Partner : | International Knowledge Partner : | Supported By :

FRUITFUL B2B MEETINGS | The  | Bio Energy Global 2025 Expo |  served as a productive hub for  | Exhibitors, Ministries, and end-users of Bioenergy |  to connect through impactful B2B meetings. | These engagements resulted in  | 500+ successful deals |  and generated  | 1000+ positive business leads | , reflecting the strong industry response to the platform. | With the presence of  | quality visitors from Government Bodies, Industry Leaders, And Energy Consumers | , the expo not only strengthened partnerships but also created valuable opportunities for  | future collaborations, investments, and adoption of sustainable energy solutions | .

Testimonials that Inspire the Future | "Participating in  | Bio Energy Global 2025 |  was a wonderful experience, bringing all key stakeholders under one roof. The expo and summit provided an excellent platform to highlight India’s efforts in biomass utilization, circular economy practices, and the Samarth Mission’s role in supporting the nation’s net-zero goals. I truly commend the organizers for creating such an impactful forum." | Shri. Anil Baweja | Director, Mission Samarth –  | Ministry of Power | "I had the privilege of participating in  | Bio Energy Global 2025 | , an excellently organized expo, and delivering a talk at the  | National Conference on Bioenergy India | , held on the second day of the event, on the topic 'Role of Bioenergy in Rural Economy.' The conference was very well-organised and insightful. It was an enriching experience that will help strengthen the integration of bioenergy in rural development initiatives. I commend the organisers for their meticulous planning and for bringing together such a diverse and knowledgeable group of stakeholders." | Shri. Sita Ram Meena  | Sr. Scientist & Director | Ministry of New and Renewable Energy | " | Bio Energy Global 2025 |  provided a timely platform to connect technology, policy, and implementation while encouraging cross-sector collaboration and knowledge exchange. We see immense synergy between  | Bio Energy |  Global’s innovations and DMRC’s eco-forward transit approach, and extend our best wishes for the continued success of this impactful initiative." | Mr. Pankaj Kumar Gupta | Power System & Energy  | Delhi Metro Rail Corporation Limited | "Bio Energy Global 2025 |  and the 3rd National Conference on Bioenergy India has brought together all stakeholders — from farmers, regulators, and entrepreneurs to technology providers and CBG plant owners — under one roof at Yashobhoomi, New Delhi. It was a truly fantastic experience with excellent arrangements, and I look forward to seeing this platform grow in scale and become a global event in the coming years. | Lt. Col.  | Mo | nish |  Ahuja (Retd.) | C | hairman &  | M | anaging  | D | irector | ,  | PRESPL and Chairman, CBEII

Testimonials that Inspire the Future | "It is a very exciting time for biomass applications, and India shows great potential in the pelleting sector and emerging technologies like torrefaction and pyrolysis. Bio Energy Global Summit 2025 has been a very complete conference, bringing together people with the same goal and creating the right platform to learn, share, and push bioenergy forward." | The summit created the right platform to learn, share, and unite everyone working towards the same goal in bioenergy. | Mr. José Ricardo Castro | Co-CEO, Prodesa Group,  | Spain | "It has been a wonderful experience participating in Bio Energy Global 2025. I was highly impressed by the organization, the wide range of technologies on display, and the genuine interest shown by visitors in bioenergy and green technologies. The atmosphere was very professional and friendly, and I look forward to coming back next year." | Mr. Jean Paul Sion |  CEO, Interis India, France | "On behalf of the Danish Embassy I want to express our gratitude for being invited to this well organised and important event  | Bio Energy Global Expo & Summit 2025 | . We are looking forward to continuing the collaboration.  | The event provided a unique platform to exchange ideas, showcase innovation, and strengthen partnerships in the renewable energy sector. I have been impressed by the knowledge shared by regulators, investors, and startups here. With that strong foundation, I am confident that India is going to accelerate rapidly in biogas and bioenergy. The conference has been fantastic — a place where so many people have come together to discuss and showcase the best technology available in India." | D | r. Rasmus Alex Wendt | Energy Attaché | The Royal Danish Embassy,  | Delhi, India | "Participating in Bio Energy Global 2025 has been a very good experience with many potential customers and leads visiting our booth.  | As a German company with a strong presence in India, it was exciting to engage with the vibrant Indian market and explore opportunities in biogas purification through our membrane technology. We truly felt the positive energy throughout the three days and look forward to the continued growth of this event in the years ahead." | Mr. Oliver Zehnacker | Membranes Head – Asia Pacific,  | Evonik, Germany

A Landmark Success and the Road Ahead Towards a Sustainable Future | The overwhelming response to  | Bio Energy Global 2025 |  highlighted its stature as a premier platform for the bioenergy and renewable energy sectors. Exhibitors, speakers, and delegates expressed immense appreciation for the well-curated expo and conferences, praising the seamless organization, impactful discussions, and opportunities for collaboration. The event successfully connected ministries, industry leaders, innovators, and end users, driving meaningful dialogue and partnerships for a sustainable future. | Messages of gratitude poured in from participants, with many emphasizing the national importance of the event and its role in addressing critical challenges in the bioenergy ecosystem. From government dignitaries to international representatives, the appreciation underscored Bio Energy Global 2025 as a hub of innovation, knowledge exchange, and business opportunity. | Looking ahead, we are delighted to announce that the next edition of  | Bio Energy Global |  will take place from  | 29th to 31st July 2026  | at  | Yashobhoomi, IICC, Dwarka, New Delhi | . Building on the landmark success of this year, the 2026 edition will not only raise the bar for innovation, collaboration, and global partnerships but will also feature concurrent shows— | Waste To Energy, Wireeex, and Reneweex | . Together, these platforms will create a powerful ecosystem for advancing clean technologies, accelerating cross-sector synergies, and driving the global journey toward a sustainable, net-zero future.

The exhibition attracted  | 10 | ,500+ visitors |  and over  | 60+ |  global speakers | , creating a powerful platform for networking, innovation, and collaboration. | The event highlighted cutting-edge advancements in  | bioenergy, | biofuels, biomass, biogas, green hydrogen, and renewable technologies | , reinforcing India’s role as a rising leader in clean energy. With the presence of key decision-makers, researchers, and corporates, the expo became a  | hub of knowledge exchange and business opportunities | . This dynamic participation set a new benchmark for the global bioenergy industry, showcasing how innovation and partnerships can accelerate the journey toward a  | net-zero and sustainable future | .
